hypothesis: SE(3)-equivariant graph neural networks trained on the XDIP data will outperform non-equivariant GNNs in structure-to-spectrum prediction of Fe K-edge XAS (XANES and EXAFS) by explicitly leveraging 3D rotational symmetry of the iron coordination environment, leading to improved spectral fidelity and better generalization to unseen iron–ligand geometries.
